cells.finalText:
AUTHORS: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin
METHODOLOGY: The Transformer replaces recurrent and convolutional components with stacked self-attention and position-wise feed-forward layers in an encoder-decoder architecture.
RESULTS: 28.4 BLEU (WMT 2014 EN-DE)

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Research the authors of the original Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need" (2017).

toolCalls.output: The paper "Attention Is All You Need" was authored by Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, and Illia Polosukhin (Google Brain / Google Research / U. Toronto, 2017).

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Research the core architectural innovation introduced in the original Transformer paper (2017) and its methodology.

toolCalls.output: The paper introduces the Transformer, a sequence-transduction architecture based solely on attention mechanisms — dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely. The encoder-decoder structure uses 6 stacked self-attention + position-wise feed-forward layers each.

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Research the headline BLEU score on WMT 2014 EN-DE translation task reported in the original Transformer paper (2017).

toolCalls.output: The Transformer achieves 28.4 BLEU on WMT 2014 English-to-German translation, improving over the previous best ensemble by 2.0 BLEU. On English-to-French, the single-model big-Transformer scores 41.0 BLEU after 3.5 days of training on 8 GPUs.

toolCalls.name: spawn_agent

input.task: Summarize the core architectural innovation of the Transformer model as introduced in 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017).

toolCalls.output: The paper introduces the Transformer, a sequence-transduction architecture based solely on attention mechanisms — dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely. The encoder-decoder structure uses 6 stacked self-attention + position-wise feed-forward layers each.

input.task: What was the headline BLEU score achieved by the Transformer model on the WMT 2014 English-to-German (EN-DE) translation task in 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017)?

toolCalls.output: The Transformer achieves 28.4 BLEU on WMT 2014 English-to-German translation, improving over the previous best ensemble by 2.0 BLEU. On English-to-French, the single-model big-Transformer scores 41.0 BLEU after 3.5 days of training on 8 GPUs.

toolCalls.name: read_paper_section
toolCalls.output: Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin.

toolCalls.name: read_paper_section
toolCalls.output: The Transformer follows an encoder-decoder structure using stacked self-attention and position-wise fully-connected feed-forward layers, both for the encoder and decoder. The encoder has 6 identical layers; each has multi-head self-attention + a position-wise feed-forward network.

toolCalls.name: read_paper_section
toolCalls.output: On the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, our big Transformer model achieves 28.4 BLEU, improving over the existing best results by 2.0 BLEU. The single-model big Transformer also achieves a new state-of-the-art 41.0 BLEU on WMT 2014 English-to-French.

3. Prioritize **self-hosted business automation** with **720 monthly searches** and a **$1.10 CPC**, leveraging its low competition to maximize ad spend efficiency and attract niche users.
